reviews.comment:
Gracias a YPF por alojarme hasta que aflojen los 90 kmh de este viento que no me deja avanzar por ruta 40

(Translated by Google)
Thanks to YPF for hosting me until the 90 km/h wind that's preventing me from moving forward on Route 40 lets up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8139321778587704191/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxcXBmZ0R3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es 24 hs, me pedí una hamburguesa y estaba rica (aunque un poco cara, 5/6 usd), tienen Wi-Fi gratis, la atención es buena, podes cargar el celular en estaciones de carga. El lugar es limpio, ordenado y organizado. Nada negativo que decir, muy bueno 🙌🏼

(Translated by Google)
It's open 24 hours a day. I ordered a burger and it was delicious (although a bit pricey at $5/$6). They have free Wi-Fi, the service is good, and you can charge your phone at the charging stations. The place is clean, tidy, and organized. Nothing negative to say, very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8139321778587704191/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWcnBfdWxBRRAB
